title: [InstCombine] Fix miscompilation for `select` + `FCmp`
author: wermos
description:
Fixes #177541

This PR fixes the miscompilation reported in #177541 by correcting the handling of fast-math flags (FMF) when there is an `FCmp` and a `select` that depends on the result of the `FCmp`.

tests.test_body:
define float @clamp_float_fast_ordered_strict_maxmin(float %x) {
  %cmp2 = fcmp fast olt float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %min = select i1 %cmp2, float %x, float 2.550000e+02
  %cmp1 = fcmp fast olt float %x, 1.000000e+00
  %r = select i1 %cmp1, float 1.000000e+00, float %min
  ret float %r
}

define float @clamp_float_fast_unordered_strict_minmax(float %x) {
  %cmp2 = fcmp fast ugt float %x, 1.000000e+00
  %max = select i1 %cmp2, float %x, float 1.000000e+00
  %cmp1 = fcmp fast ugt float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %r = select i1 %cmp1, float 2.550000e+02, float %max
  ret float %r
}

define float @clamp_test_1(float %x) {
  %inner_cmp = fcmp fast ult float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %inner_sel = select i1 %inner_cmp, float %x, float 2.550000e+02
  %outer_cmp = fcmp fast ugt float %x, 1.000000e+00
  %r = select i1 %outer_cmp, float %inner_sel, float 1.000000e+00
  ret float %r
}

define float @clamp_float_fast_unordered_strict_maxmin(float %x) {
  %cmp2 = fcmp fast ult float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %min = select i1 %cmp2, float %x, float 2.550000e+02
  %cmp1 = fcmp fast ult float %x, 1.000000e+00
  %r = select i1 %cmp1, float 1.000000e+00, float %min
  ret float %r
}

define float @clamp_float_fast_unordered_nonstrict_maxmin(float %x) {
  %cmp2 = fcmp fast ult float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %min = select i1 %cmp2, float %x, float 2.550000e+02
  %cmp1 = fcmp fast ule float %x, 1.000000e+00
  %r = select i1 %cmp1, float 1.000000e+00, float %min
  ret float %r
}

define float @clamp_float_fast_ordered_strict_minmax(float %x) {
  %cmp2 = fcmp fast ogt float %x, 1.000000e+00
  %max = select i1 %cmp2, float %x, float 1.000000e+00
  %cmp1 = fcmp fast ogt float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %r = select i1 %cmp1, float 2.550000e+02, float %max
  ret float %r
}

define float @clamp_select_no_fmf_strengthening(float %x) {
entry:
  %a = fcmp nnan ninf ult float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %b = select i1 %a, float 2.550000e+02, float %x
  %c = fcmp nnan ugt float %x, 5.120000e+02
  %r = select i1 %c, float 5.120000e+02, float %b
  ret float %r
}

define float @clamp_float_fast_ordered_nonstrict_maxmin(float %x) {
  %cmp2 = fcmp fast olt float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %min = select i1 %cmp2, float %x, float 2.550000e+02
  %cmp1 = fcmp fast ole float %x, 1.000000e+00
  %r = select i1 %cmp1, float 1.000000e+00, float %min
  ret float %r
}

define float @clamp_float_fast_unordered_nonstrict_minmax(float %x) {
  %cmp2 = fcmp fast ugt float %x, 1.000000e+00
  %max = select i1 %cmp2, float %x, float 1.000000e+00
  %cmp1 = fcmp fast uge float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %r = select i1 %cmp1, float 2.550000e+02, float %max
  ret float %r
}

define i32 @mixed_clamp_to_i32_2(float %x) {
  %float_min_cmp = fcmp ogt float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %float_min = select i1 %float_min_cmp, float 2.550000e+02, float %x
  %i32_min = fptosi float %float_min to i32
  %lo_cmp = fcmp olt float %x, 1.000000e+00
  %r = select i1 %lo_cmp, i32 1, i32 %i32_min
  ret i32 %r
}

define <2 x float> @mixed_clamp_to_float_vec(<2 x i32> %x) {
  %si_min_cmp = icmp sgt <2 x i32> %x, splat (i32 255)
  %si_min = select <2 x i1> %si_min_cmp, <2 x i32> splat (i32 255), <2 x i32> %x
  %f_min = sitofp <2 x i32> %si_min to <2 x float>
  %f_x = sitofp <2 x i32> %x to <2 x float>
  %lo_cmp = fcmp ult <2 x float> %f_x, splat (float 1.000000e+00)
  %r = select <2 x i1> %lo_cmp, <2 x float> splat (float 1.000000e+00), <2 x float> %f_min
  ret <2 x float> %r
}

define float @clamp_float_fast_ordered_nonstrict_minmax(float %x) {
  %cmp2 = fcmp fast ogt float %x, 1.000000e+00
  %max = select i1 %cmp2, float %x, float 1.000000e+00
  %cmp1 = fcmp fast oge float %x, 2.550000e+02
  %r = select i1 %cmp1, float 2.550000e+02, float %max
  ret float %r
}

define i8 @t11(float %a, float %b) {
  %1 = fcmp fast ult float %b, %a
  %2 = fptosi float %a to i8
  %3 = fptosi float %b to i8
  %4 = select i1 %1, i8 %3, i8 %2
  ret i8 %4
}

comments.author: wermos
comments.body:
~I am aware that I committed some commented code.~

The way I addressed the miscompilation caused some test changes in 5 other test files. I'm not sure if my fix was too heavy-handed.

~I'll remove the commented code once I am more confident of my fix.~

comments.author: valadaptive
comments.body: I think https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/177821 touched some of the same tests, which may need to be regenerated.

comments.author: wermos
comments.body:
> I think #177821 touched some of the same tests, which may need to be regenerated.

Got it. I'll rebase my branch on top of the current `main`.

comments.author: dtcxzyw
comments.body: Can you have a look at whether this patch also fixes https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/157254? The original reproducer is a bit different from this one. But they share the common code path.

comments.author: wermos
comments.body:
> Can you have a look at whether this patch also fixes #157254?

I tried it out and the issue is still present even after this PR.

comments.author: wermos
comments.body: @arsenm could you please take a look at the reworked fix?

comments.author: wermos
comments.body: @arsenm I've addressed all the review comments you made.

comments.author: wermos
comments.body:
@dtcxzyw could you please review this? This PR underwent some initial review rounds and I think it is good enough to be merged but it is stuck in a perpetual loop of pinging and asking for code review.

Ping @nikic also.

comments.author: dtcxzyw
comments.body:
Intersecting flags still doesn't work for a slightly modified reproducer: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/gT485h
```

----------------------------------------
define float @src(float noundef %x) {
entry:
  %a = fcmp nnan ninf ult float noundef %x, 255.000000
  %b = select i1 %a, float 255.000000, float noundef %x
  %c = fcmp nnan ugt float noundef %x, 512.000000
  %r = select ninf i1 %c, float 512.000000, float %b
  ret float %r
}
=>
define float @tgt(float noundef %x) {
entry:
  %a.inv = fcmp nnan ninf oge float noundef %x, 255.000000
  %b = select nnan ninf i1 %a.inv, float noundef %x, float 255.000000
  %.inv = fcmp ole float %b, 512.000000
  %r = select i1 %.inv, float %b, float 512.000000
  ret float %r
}
Transformation doesn't verify!

ERROR: Target is more poisonous than source

NOTE: The counterexample is unique.

Example:
float noundef %x = #x7f800000 (+oo)

Source:
i1 %a = poison
float %b = poison
i1 %c = #x1 (1)
float %r = #x44000000 (512)

Target:
i1 %a.inv = poison
float %b = poison
i1 %.inv = poison
float %r = poison
Source value: #x44000000 (512)
Target value: poison
```
